channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Maritime Security
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Remote
Description:

A remote Inventory & Logistics Lead position is available to support a patrol boat fleet. The role involves leading inventory and materiel planning, identifying parts, sourcing and procuring items, and managing supply chain risks within defence logistics systems. This position requires experience in inventory management and logistics, preferably within a defence or government environment.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Inventory Logistics Lead Job - Patrol Boat Fleet at Amentum

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Opportunities are available for individuals with ex-military experience to transition into maritime security roles. Key transferable skills include discipline, threat awareness, and effective communication. Responsibilities involve watchkeeping, access control, and incident reporting on cargo vessels and ferry operations. Candidates must possess valid seafarer documents, understand shipboard command structures, and demonstrate strong written and verbal English for reporting and communication. Professional conduct and adaptability to maritime regulations are essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Security Officer Vacancy at M.S Security Group

item.description:
Location: abroad
Description:

Experienced Maritime Security personnel are sought for roles on cruise liners, ferries, cargo vessels, and port facilities. Candidates with a background in military, police, border services, or private security are encouraged to apply. A minimum English level of Intermediate is required, along with discipline, responsibility, and a willingness to work abroad. This position offers official employment, competitive wages, and international career development opportunities.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Security Officer Jobs on Cruise Liners and Cargo Vessels at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Maritime security professionals are sought for unarmed security guard positions on commercial vessels, passenger fleets, and ferries. Contract durations range from 3 to 6 months. Applicants must complete an application form and undergo screening, interviews, and an SOP course. Required documents include a biometric passport, seaman's book, and relevant STCW certificates. Travel expenses are covered or refundable by the employer.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Security Guard Jobs on Various Vessels at M.S Security & Personnel Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Salary: 120 EUR p/d NET

Joining: 10.03.2026

Duration: 28 days

Requirements:

  • Experience in rank on similar vessels
  • All valid STCW documents
  • COP III/5
  • LV/LT citizens only


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Marine Mechanic on Guard Vessel – STCW and COP III/5 Required at OJ Crew

item.description:
Location:
Description:

WHY JOIN BSM?

  • Be part of a multi-cultural working environment with high safety standards that focuses on sustainable ship operations and environmental protection.
  • Profit from many opportunities for growth by continuing to develop your professional career supported by our bespoke internal training programmes.
  • Benefit from BSM commitment to pay wages in full, correctly and on time.
  • Share your ideas – get involved, lead and inspire.

We’ll take good care of you at sea so you can look after your loved ones on shore.

Security Guard

Ship Type: Passenger Ship
Flag: Bahamas
DWT: 1398
Main Engine: Normo Diesel(BRM-8)
Estimated Joining: 30-Oct-2025
Contract Duration: 5 to 6 (Months)

Required Qualifications

Rank Experience: Minimum 12-16 month(s) experience as Security Guard
Visa: Schengen Visa


Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Security Guard | Cruise Ship (25OTVE09900) at Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement (BSM)

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

ALSS is looking for experienced Maritime Security Officers complying with the Industry standards and Company requirements.

Mandatory Requirements:

  • Minimum 4 years continuous military service experience
  • STCW 95 Certificate
  • SSO (Ship Security Officer)
  • Seafarers Medical Certificate (ENG1)
  • Yellow fever vaccination certificate
  • MSO Course
  • Passport (with a minimum of 6 months remaining and blank pages for visa applications)
  • Mental Health Clearance
  • Exemplary Testimonial and proof of Military service (if applicable)
  • Criminal Record Check
  • Fire Arms Competency Certificate
  • Seaman’s Card and Discharge Book disclosure
  • Trauma/1st Aid qualification (desirable)
  • Multilingual (desirable)
  • 2 recent references

All the above qualifications have been developed to meet the needs of ISO/PAS 9001:2008, ISO/PAS 28007:2013 & ISO/PAS 28007-1:2015 in order to comply with Maritime Security Standards.

All the papers along with your CV to be submitted to the HR Department at:



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Maritime Security Officers at Al Safina Security

item.description:
Location: Russia
Description:

Камчатская производственно-коммерческая фирма «Камлайн» основана в 1991 году. Основная сфера деятельности фирмы – круглогодичная добыча и переработка на борту судов гидробионтов, обитающих в богатых сырьевыми ресурсами и экологически чистых Охотском и Беринговом морях, что само по себе является гарантией высокого качества продукции.

Компания владеет современными судами, оборудованными для ведения тралового промысла и выпуска готовой свежемороженой продукции всех видов разделки – от неразделанной и штучной до потрошено-обезглавленной. 

Флот оснащен всем необходимым оборудованием – специализированными траловыми системами и автоматизированными конвейерными линиями обработки улова.

На судах находятся цеха с современным технологическим и морозильным оборудованием, которое позволяет перерабатывать рыбопродукцию на уровне мировых стандартов.

  • На данный момент в нашей компании открыта вакансия: Старший помощник капитана (диплом до 3000 р.т.)

ДОПОЛНИТЕЛЬНО ДЛЯ ВСЕХ ВАКАНСИЙ ТРЕБУЕТСЯ ПРОХОЖДЕНИЕ МЕДИЦИНСКОЙ КОМИССИИ И ИНСТРУКТАЖА ПО ТБ, НАЛИЧИЕ ПАСПОРТА МОРЯКА И РАБОЧЕГО ДИПЛОМА МРП С ПОДТВЕРЖДЕНИЯМИ. ДЛЯ ВАКАНСИЙ СУДОВОГО ВРАЧА И МЕХАНИКА ТО ОБЯЗАТЕЛЬНО ПРОХОЖДЕНИЕ ОБУЧЕНИЯ ПО НПБЖС.

Если Вас заинтересовало предложение, свяжитесь с нами по адресу:



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Судовой врач (фельдшер) at Камлайн

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

We have the pleasure to introduce ourselves as a Crewing company in Klaipeda, Lithuania. Company Gretimybe was founded in 1997 by a group of specialists experienced in crewing, shipping and sea business. Today Gretimybe is the biggest crewing company in Baltic States.

We are looking for:

  • Position: Superintendent's Assistant
  • Salary: 2800 EUR p/m
  • Contract duration: 4 month(s)
  • Requirement(s): Good English; Experience in rank of 2nd/3rd officer or 3rd/4th engineer; EU citizenship.

If you are interested with this job – click the "Apply here" button and send your CV.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Superintendents Assistant with salary 2800 EUR at Gretimybe Ltd.
